# channel.md

- Do not use emojis in channel.md (emojis are fine in chat).

- [ ] Prep beta release notes (owner: TBD, due: 2026-07-03, P1)
- [ ] Fix auth redirect bug (owner: Riley, due: TBD, P0)
- [ ] Schedule customer interviews (owner: TBD, due: 2026-07-07, P1)
```
